# cancelSubscription <kbd>Mutation</kbd>

> Cancel a workspace subscription.
> 
> The workspace retains access to paid features until
> `currentPeriodEnd`. After that date, the workspace is
> downgraded to the free tier automatically.
> 
> Cancellation sends a Stripe API call to stop future renewals
> and records the `canceledAt` timestamp locally.

**Defined in:** `procedures.zmodel`

<summary>Declaration · <code>procedures.zmodel</code></summary>

    subscriptionId: String
): Subscription
